I literally fell in love with the garden view the moment I arrived. it sets such a peaceful mood. The location is unmatched, sitting super close to the Jungle Safari point (a huge plus for early risers!).

• The Food is MESMERIZING: Do yourself a favor and order dinner by the bonfire in the late evening. The atmosphere + the taste = pure magic. 🥘🔥
• Service Level 100: We had an early morning safari, and the team (legends!) had breakfast ready for us before we even left. That’s what I call "cherry on top" service.
• The MVP: A massive shoutout to the GM, Mr. varun. He is an honest, hands-on host who ensures everything runs smoothly, including sorting out extra bedding for us without a fuss.
A couple of "Pro-Tips" for the Management:
The rooms are spotless and the interiors are lovely. Also, since you guys are experts on the area, a quick 5-10 minute "Insider Guide" briefing at check-in (similar to how bnbs/stays in Vietnam or Malaysia do it) would be a game-changer for guests looking to explore!

Verdict:
Great staff, incredible food, and a vibe you won't forget. If there’s one word that perfectly sums up this New Year’s Eve party, it’s UNFORGETTABLE

From the moment we walked in, the vibe was electric. The décor screamed celebration glittering lights, elegant setups, and a perfect festive ambience that instantly made you feel like *this* is where the year should end and a new one should begin. 🎉✨

The music? Absolutely on point. The DJ kept the energy alive throughout the night, seamlessly switching between party anthems, throwbacks, and fresh beats that made it impossible to stay off the dance floor. Every countdown moment felt surreal, and when the clock struck midnight, the place erupted with cheers, confetti, and pure joy. 🥂🎆

Let’s talk about the food and drinks—top notch! From delicious starters to refreshing cocktails, everything was well-curated and perfectly served. The staff was extremely courteous and well-managed, making sure everyone was comfortable and having a great time.

What truly made the night special was the crowd and the overall vibe—happy faces, laughter, dancing, and strangers turning into friends as we welcomed the New Year together. It wasn’t just a party; it was an experience.

This New Year’s Eve celebration set the bar really high. If you’re looking for a place that knows how to host a night full of energy, elegance, and unforgettable memories this is it.

Cheers to new beginnings, good vibes, and nights we’ll remember forever. 🥂✨
10/10 would relive it again!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Yogesh Barai","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrICkiYowm9ewj8N7Hp_iT38w1Fl0BWCMINi-IIwLpaDtlnHbn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Booked Winter Green Room type. This was, without a doubt, one of the worst hotel experiences I’ve ever had. We had booked this property for eight nights, but what my colleague and I went through was nothing short of traumatic.

The so-called “Rock House” room was filthy beyond words—it looked like it hadn’t been cleaned in years. The bathroom was a disaster: water leaking everywhere, a malfunctioning flush that splashed water across the floor, and a constant foul smell. The air conditioner didn’t work properly and kept switching on and off all night due to voltage issues, making the room unbearably uncomfortable.

As if that weren’t enough, the most horrifying part was the infestation of rodents. Loud, incessant scratching and running sounds from inside the false ceiling made sleep impossible. It was deeply unsettling and completely unacceptable.

We were forced to check out by the morning of the third day and requested a partial refund, which we believe we rightfully deserve. Unfortunately, the aggressive and disrespectful conduct of both the staff and Mr. Istaqbal left us with no choice but to seek police assistance late at night.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mohit Chachra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1OfKbZGMQIbQml4iqwNWXpymSUIuokNmlHyHer-KmDNDDbw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The washroom of the rock room is in very bad condition.
there is no wifi in the room.
Spa tub is not available as mentioned in online booking.
TV is also not available in the room.
Staff is not available after 10 pm, no one has even kept a water bottle in the room","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB2yjXLUfFoqWa2Wqyvvd4j&fid=0x0:0x3d048dbf56537cae"],"When":"2025-8-26"},{"Name":"asha kujur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKMr6JmV_r1iVKptrfB7sIvc3kFGRLM6W33ZS8ERnfb6O6RVQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Absolutely Disgusting – Avoid at All Costs!
I’m shocked that this place is even listed on MMT. I had booked what was supposed to be the best room at this property, but what I walked into was an absolute nightmare.
The room was filthy and reeking, with stained, stinky bedsheets, pillow covers, curtains, and rugs. There were spider webs all over the place, and it was clear the room hadn’t been cleaned in months. Despite arriving late at 9:00 PM, I expected basic hygiene at the very least—but the hotel staff was useless.
The washroom was disgusting, with a leaking commode that filled the space with a horrible stench. To make things worse, the AC wasn’t functioning in the middle of May’s scorching heat. The staff kept making false promises about getting it fixed.
My stay was a sleepless nightmare—there were rats and lizards running around the room and across the false ceiling. The locks were rusted, and the fittings were falling apart. This place is a health and safety hazard and should not be open to guests at all.
As for amenities—they are a joke, non-functional AC, no electricity for 4–5 hours, no TV, no intercom. The food was horrendous—everything dripping with oil and overpowered with chat masala. I felt unsafe and completely uncomfortable, and ended up checking out on the morning of day 3, despite having pre-booked and paid for 9 days.
The final insult came from the rude and arrogant owner, who first ignored my calls and then flat-out refused any refund. He had the audacity to claim that his property was “one of the best in the area” – a complete delusion.
There are many other excellent properties in this area that actually care about cleanliness, safety, and hospitality. Do not ruin your holiday or work trip by staying at this disgusting, mismanaged, and unsafe place. I wouldn’t wish this experience on anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vivek Dwivedi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZHty-e6zHGbVLcvvIVPOnSZwleCEL8IeURg71EQ4O-meZOb0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have no words to express simply superb place and superb support and superb atmosphere. A Perfect Long Stay Experience in the Heart of Pachmarhi!

I stayed at Hotel Panchmarhi for 20 days, and it truly felt like a home away from home. The hotel is centrally located, making it extremely convenient to explore all the major attractions of Pachmarhi. Everything from the local market to the restaurants and sightseeing points is just a short walk or drive away.

The rooms are spacious, clean, and well-maintained, offering all the comforts needed for a long stay. Housekeeping was regular and efficient, ensuring a fresh and pleasant environment throughout my time there.

What stood out most was the homely food—simple, fresh, and delicious. The kitchen staff deserves special mention for their warmth and readiness to customize meals when needed. It’s rare to find such genuine hospitality these days.

The staff at the reception and management were courteous, responsive, and always willing to help—from arranging local transport to providing useful travel tips. Their personal touch and attention to detail made my stay truly memorable.

If you’re looking for a comfortable, centrally located, and value-for-money stay in Pachmarhi—whether for a few days or a long duration—Hotel Panchmarhi is the perfect choice. Highly recommended for families, solo travelers, and anyone who values comfort with a personal touch.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sanjay Hazra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdKyB9qEkCswd3NE7QuZAVPBI6hNhYbSbJB2gBaIYw8B5eQAtk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A very nice hotel for the price, located in a beautiful location. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Pinakinath Banerjee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgBXYQii0VoofyH60Qdn10kw-F9QX2rElr42Toi1YOuvNtMiRx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I stayed at Hotel Kshama with my father for two days in Room no. 3( Non-AC).The hotel is located near Badi Shanwala Masjid and Omti Police station, making it easy to find. It's one of the cheaper options in Jabalpur, but you get exactly what you pay for -- the place is not very clean or well-maintained. So don't expect a glittery or comfortable ambience.
As two male travelers, we managed our stay without much issue. However, I would not recommend this hotel for women or families, as the cleanliness and overall setup are not suitable for everyone.
One positive side, the staff were polite and cooperative, especially Nripen Bhai, who helped us arrange a car for sightseeing -- much appreciated.
One thing I strongly disliked was that, even though I had prepaid through irctc.com, the hotel manager asked for payment again on the last day, which was completely unprofessional.
Overall, Hotel Kshama is fine if you're looking for a budget stay for a short trip. Highly recommended!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kartavya Atri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_Lherzec9yiBmmkwUsVY1WPpi9K0gN6iOHBSk9I4Q6DqZoC_AQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stayed there for 2 nights !

I literally fell in love with the garden view the moment I arrived. it sets such a peaceful mood. The location is unmatched, sitting super close to the Jungle Safari point (a huge plus for early risers!).
What makes this place a "Must-Visit":
• The Food is MESMERIZING: Do yourself a favor and order dinner by the bonfire in the late evening. The atmosphere + the taste = pure magic. 🥘🔥
• Service Level 100: We had an early morning safari, and the team (legends!) had breakfast ready for us before we even left. That’s what I call "cherry on top" service.
• The MVP: A massive shoutout to the GM, Mr. varun. He is an honest, hands-on host who ensures everything runs smoothly, including sorting out extra bedding for us without a fuss.
A couple of "Pro-Tips" for the Management:
The rooms are spotless and the interiors are lovely. Also, since you guys are experts on the area, a quick 5-10 minute "Insider Guide" briefing at check-in (similar to how bnbs/stays in Vietnam or Malaysia do it) would be a game-changer for guests looking to explore!

Great staff, incredible food, and a vibe you won't forget. Nestled just minutes away from the Kanha National Park gate, this place offers the perfect blend of comfort, tranquility, and authentic jungle vibes.

The rooms were clean, spacious, and well-maintained — ideal for a peaceful retreat after an exciting safari. The staff went above and beyond to make us feel at home, always ready with a warm smile and helpful suggestions about safari bookings and local spots.

What sets Motel Chandan apart is its genuine hospitality and down-to-earth atmosphere. You can feel the care and passion the team puts into ensuring every guest leaves with happy memories.

The motel is located just 100 m away from the gate. Mr. Amit is a wonderful person to interact with. All staff is courteous. I recommend having meals at resort, they serve amazing food","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBH2BUVmlH3q3JwJvNtcF_t&fid=0x0:0xce457c4a2c51f5eb"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"madhu singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKNpiQUeTkVq-4wJi0z09jMbHoUSlHUe928TYVS2INqX7cmXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently stayed at Motel Chanda during my visit to Kanha National Park, and it turned out to be a great choice for a comfortable and nature-close experience.

Location:
The resort is conveniently located close to the park gate, making early morning safaris very manageable. The peaceful surroundings and greenery add to the charm, giving it a serene, forest-lodge feel.

Service:
The staff was polite, friendly, and always ready to help. They also helped us book our safari and provided useful local tips. The service was prompt, and we felt well taken care of throughout our stay.

Food:
The food was simple but delicious—mostly homestyle Indian meals. They do accommodate specific requests if given some time in advance. The dining area is nice, and meals were served hot and fresh.

Extras:
There’s a nice garden area to relax in, and they sometimes arrange for a bonfire in the evening, which is a lovely touch. Wi-Fi may be spotty at times, but that’s expected in remote forest areas.

Overall Rating: 5/5

If you’re looking for a clean, comfortable, and affordable place to stay near Kanha with a touch of local hospitality, Motel Chanda is a solid option.

I am writing to formally register my complaint regarding our extremely disappointing stay at your property during the New Year period. What was planned as a joyful family celebration was completely ruined due to deliberate and unethical actions by your reception team.
We had clearly informed the reception staff that we were one family and specifically wanted to stay together in a single family room to spend quality time during the New Year. The reception team was fully aware of this requirement. Despite this, we were intentionally denied the family room, even though it was available and would have perfectly fulfilled our needs.
Instead, purely to earn a few extra bucks, the reception staff refused to allot the family room and forced us to stay in two separate tents. This decision was not due to unavailability, but a conscious, money-driven choice. As a result, our family was unnecessarily split, and we were deprived of spending time together—completely defeating the purpose of booking a family-friendly property for New Year celebrations.
This act alone caused immense frustration and stress for our entire family. It was extremely disappointing to see such blatant prioritization of extra revenue over guest comfort, family needs, and basic hospitality ethics.
In addition to this, the tents provided lacked basic amenities such as a kettle, tea/coffee supplies, proper hot water, and sufficient space for luggage. Food was frequently served almost cold, and the so-called kids’ area and adventure activities were largely broken or unusable, despite being advertised as functional.
What further aggravated the situation was the rude, sarcastic, and dismissive attitude of the staff when we raised these genuine concerns. There was no empathy, no effort to resolve issues—only arrogance and a money-minded approach.
Because of these actions, our New Year celebration was completely spoiled, causing unnecessary stress and disappointment to the entire family. This experience falls far below acceptable hospitality standards.
I expect this complaint to be taken seriously and request a proper explanation along with an appropriate resolution for the inconvenience and distress caused.

Albeit the google map won't drive you to the correct location, the hotel staff will come to guide you through from your location.

The rooms are tidy and the stay is cozy. The only thing missing was a heater in the sleeping area and the hooks/hanger in the bathroom. Since, the temperature really falls significantly, a heater is much needed and essential.

Having said that, this was a little balanced by providing a continuous hot water supply so an extra point to that.

The premise is clean, the staff is good and early morning view is just breathtaking.

By road the place is about 80 km from nearest big city Jabalpur. The hotel is located in the center of the town. The room size is good and they clean and change sheets everyday. The rooms have airconditioner, ceiling fan, television set and an intercom telephone. Internet connection not available. It is a residential hotel only - no restaurant available. One has to go out to nearby small shops to buy breakfast. However, an enterprising gentleman provides room service with home made food for dinner for a nominal price. This time, the experience was not good. Bad services. Though the food was good and delicious. The location is superb, nice property but management seems to be not serious now in keeping the facilities in best condition. The electrical switches are not working, broken and damaged. AC remote not working. Toiletries always issue. Even tea and coffee kit were not being replenished.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"R Narain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9RNnPQNFTsQB_9s8_nJEyHMeaT0ldyAVCUR5dNxRcvfQXxt5VNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"A Strict AVOID – Completely Ruined Our Holiday!

This motel is a huge letdown and nowhere close to what’s shown in their ads or reels. It’s poorly managed, unhygienic, and completely unprofessional.

Dirty & Neglected Rooms: Washrooms were filthy, linens unwashed, and drawers still had used wrappers from previous guests. Even an empty wrapper was found in the washroom! Clearly, housekeeping is nonexistent.

No Real Service: There’s no intercom. You’re given a mobile number for any assistance — but when you call, no one shows up. After an hour, you call again, and someone new answers pretending to know nothing about your earlier request. This happens every single time.

Noisy & Uncomfortable: The property allows loud liquor parties on the lawns, making it impossible for families or anyone looking for peace to feel comfortable. Since the stay is prepaid, you’re left with no recourse or refund.

Dishonest Billing: Restaurant billing is non-transparent — the same dish is charged differently on different days. Bills are handwritten without GST, and when questioned, the executive rudely said, “We do like this only, whether you like it or not.”

Delayed Meals: Even when dinner is pre-ordered at 6 PM for 9 PM, don’t expect anything before 10 PM — and only after multiple reminders.

Overall, this place is a disaster — dirty, noisy, and unprofessional. A strict AVOID. MPTDC should seriously look into how such a poorly managed property is allowed to operate under its name.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amarjeet Singh Bhatia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJHejoSy7PUV8FkClE-8sqpUqWX5sazmyJPMz0PhOsb2V20Hg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Had VERY BAD EXPERIENCE.
Service for food remained very slow. Quality of food need to be precautionary. I suggest to keep primery medicine kit containing vomiting teblet etc. while staying over here.
Supplies of food by room service needs lots of patients... Tea temperature supplied at room was close to ice tea...
Wi-Fi connectivity in rooms in pathetic. We got cottage 303, 304; where hardly could have WiFi reach. Garden area not well-maintained. Except caramboard and unserviced few cycles, no other extra facilities are available.
I also noticed that the geyser did not function during power outages, which was inconvenient. Power outages quite longer time.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ashwati sasikumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJt1jj2o5fUN7cZsp4LhKVRfGrgtwoXQfwxem5kjQKV2teWa1A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited this place and had such a wonderful experience!

I highly recommend this resort to anyone looking for peaceful and excellent customer service. I will definitely be visiting again! 🎂","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Man1959julika","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0Qf66pF81jsVXBxevYxxL5FsdlDsKAngAUpJVE-hAwai1rl8J0QnYqktKV3UGdpbmNlc_A=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"My friend and I recently stayed at Motel Tamia to experience the magic of Tamia during the monsoon, and it truly exceeded our expectations.||Nestled in the lush greenery of the Satpura hills, Motel Tamia is not just a hotel—it's more like a resort with separate cottages, offering privacy and tranquility. Each cottage houses four spacious rooms—two on the upper level and two below. We stayed in one of the upper rooms, which was immaculately clean, spacious, and well-equipped with all modern amenities including a TV, electric kettle, and comfortable furnishings.||What made our stay truly memorable was the incredible view from the back of our room. It overlooked a dense forest, where a gurgling creek wound its way through the green expanse—an absolute treat for nature lovers. From there, you could also catch a mesmerizing glimpse of the Satpura mountain range. The front balcony opened to the well-maintained lawn, and walking through the hotel’s winding stone paths lined with tall trees and curated gardens felt like strolling through a natural haven.||The room service was prompt and efficient, and the staff’s hospitality was exceptional—always courteous, attentive, and warm. The food was delicious, adding yet another feather to the cap of this beautiful property. Ample parking space is also available for guests.||However, one aspect that did slightly dampen the experience was the weekend tourist crowd. Large groups sometimes arrive and unfortunately disrupt the serene ambiance with loud music and unruly behavior. It would greatly benefit the hotel’s overall atmosphere if the management enforced some guidelines to curb noise and promote responsible tourism.||Despite that, Motel Tamia remains a highly recommended stay for nature lovers, peace seekers, and those wishing to explore Tamia’s raw monsoon beauty. We left with our hearts full and memories etched in green.||🌿 Rating: 4.5/5","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mayank Dubey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXw4ON0UnQRzu05-4MH5bNPXAizt4FrsBZ6D9-IM8wJWA7BHoDe=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you want to spend time with friends and family, you can check-out this place. The overall food is good and service is well maintained. There are two different section with different theme.
The garden is well maintained. It is located near by Tamia and the best thing is there is no need to take long roads this place is located in the main road itself so anyone can find it easily.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Jungle King Resort
address: Kanha Tiger Reserve, Khatia, Chiraidongri - Kanha Rd Near Kanha entry gate, Khatia Narangi Rd, Madhya Pradesh 481768
complete_address: {"borough":"","street":"Kanha Tiger Reserve, Khatia, Chiraidongri - Kanha Rd Near Kanha entry gate, Khatia Narangi Rd","city":"Khatiya Narangi","postal_code":"481768","state":"Madhya Pradesh","country":"IN"}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lakshya Pratap","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-QKkvpbcuAzdSZWjLpSm1Nohx2kIQv9-bH2J3vIvEIVrZcA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The overall experience at this resort was extremely disappointing. There were mosquitoes everywhere, making the stay uncomfortable. Even basic amenities like a toothbrush were not provided, and there was no mirror in the washroom, which is a basic necessity. The room also had no TV and no fridge, which is unacceptable for a resort charging premium rates.
When we asked for tea, the staff said we should have informed in advance, which is completely unprofessional. Morning tea was not provided despite an early safari, and there was no kettle or tea/coffee premix in the room.
Food quality was very poor — bad taste, low quality, and very limited variety. We were even charged extra for curd, which is a basic and necessary item in any buffet. Guests were not informed in advance that all meals would not be properly prepared.
Recreational facilities were also disappointing, with very poor game facilities and nothing properly maintained.
The staff showed a negative attitude and were not helpful when assistance was required. Overall, this resort is not worth the money.
There are many other resorts in the same area that can provide a much better experience at the same cost, making this place a poor choice.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mohsin Saifi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK0InWE7FCgwiEpPYwEwFcEgrWkjugrW-EXq3iTIYu2uo9Hvg8W=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited Jungle King Resort at Kanha National Park and it turned out to be one of the most delightful experiences I’ve ever had! The resort is beautifully located in the heart of the jungle, offering a perfect balance of peace, natural beauty and comfort. The property is huge, lush green and gives a true feeling of being amidst nature while enjoying all modern facilities.

We had a fantastic lunch there the taste, quality and presentation of the food were simply exceptional. Honestly, I have never experienced such delicious taste and outstanding service at such a nominal price. Every dish was prepared with great care and the flavors were unforgettable.

The hospitality and service were top-notch. A special thanks to Mr. Tabish Siddiqui, Mr. Sachin Thakur, and Mr. Ateek Sheikh (Receptionist) for their kindness, warmth and professionalism. They made us feel truly welcome and took care of every little detail with a smile.

The ambience, cleanliness and overall atmosphere of the resort are simply amazing. It’s the kind of place where you instantly feel relaxed and at peace. I honestly felt a bit of regret that I didn’t stay here from the beginning of my trip — visiting later made me realize what I was missing!

The experience was so impressive that it has compelled me to plan a week-long stay here soon. For anyone visiting Kanha National Park, I highly recommend Tiger King Resort a place where you’ll find unmatched taste, warm hospitality, peaceful surroundings and incredible value for money.

Truly a hidden gem in the heart of nature! 🌿✨","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Prashant Nigam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnlaybY5d5B1XiBhzdJQBSQAxHa8kKBZ1Ha2CRLUGSLcAf9pgq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"📍 Excellent Location: The resort is located very close to Khatia Gate — just about half a kilometre away, making it a perfect stay option if you have safari bookings from this gate.

🏡 Spacious and Scenic Property: Spread across around 15 acres, the resort offers a serene natural environment with lush greenery and a small pond adding to its charm.

🛏️ Comfortable Stay Options: The rooms, villas, and cottages are well-maintained, spacious, and comfortable — ideal for both families and groups.

🏊 Clean Swimming Pool: The swimming pool is clean and well-kept, providing a refreshing experience after a day of safari or sightseeing.

🍽️ Delicious Food & Great Ambience: The restaurant serves very tasty food with a nice ambience, offering a pleasant dining experience.

💰 Good Value for Money: The pricing is quite affordable, especially during the off-season and early winter, making it a great budget-friendly choice without compromising on comfort.

👩‍💼 Warm Hospitality: The owner herself personally looks after guests with kindness and politeness, and all staff members are courteous and helpful.

⚡ Convenient Facilities: The resort also provides an electric car charging point, which is a thoughtful addition for modern travellers.

✅ Overall: Jungle King Resort, Kanha is a perfect blend of comfort, nature, and warm hospitality — highly recommended for anyone visiting Kanha, especially for those entering through the Khatia Gate.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAzW0rzvYuCWYAkOK9lyHl3&fid=0x0:0xc980ac9d4786dfba"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"Alina Khan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUh1TH0RSfT-6rN3lTxwHzAwUodZyK1ym-S812FrfYZqHlHv1rX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The stay at Jungle King resort was relaxing and comfortable. Yummy homely meals, cozy rooms, prompt service especially by Sonal and the dining team and always ready to help - the owner Mr. Tabish. The location is just near the Kanha buffer zone. What else does one want.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"chanchal namdeo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVx4bM-MZ46XezIuQ-EaGVxipt_USdbmioDvqcAcfVZq9ufaRGt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had a very pleasant stay here. The resort is well maintained, peaceful, and surrounded by nature. Rooms were clean and comfortable, staff was polite and helpful, and the overall atmosphere was calm and relaxing. Food was good and the location is perfect for a Kanha visit. A great place to stay if you want a comfortable and quiet experience close to nature.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MANOJ KUMAR SONI","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMQ8k65HyyoVBRgXGXO1fZQo1AiflXdBHf376Ujnx_g3OFJA8s=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've visited Jungle King Resort several times with my group. The arrangements here are excellent for groups, and it's a great place for a destination wedding in Kanha National Park.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Imran Ali sayed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8mCkHYDs9ry-kLmliE8NRhnSX_ByqmdzEMx9LgeqIlx0PM224=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"🌿 Jungal King Resort – Kanha’s True Gem! 🌿
One of the best resorts in Kanha! Excellent hospitality, peaceful ambience, top-class service, and delicious food. A special thanks to Mr. Tabish Jalil and Mrs. Anjum Ma’am for their warm welcome and the way they’ve beautifully maintained this property. Jungle Safari arrangements are perfectly managed from here itself. Truly, if you visit Kanha and don’t stay at Jungal King, your trip is incomplete! 🌿✨
🌿 Jungal King Resort – Kanha ka Asli King! 🌿","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZOoYzABJNE23DvvQxRPSB&fid=0x0:0xc980ac9d4786dfba"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Ashma Khan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1iKV6exg1xoycq1gdM9xBd90IZmTIZTHbNxLVlIH4DWssrDV4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The dining hall was absolutely aesthetic and spacious — such a perfect vibe to enjoy a relaxing meal! 🍽️ The food… oh my goodness 😍 — hands down the best chicken and desserts I’ve ever had! ❤️
I’ve stayed at several resorts in Kanha, but Jungle King Resort truly stands out. The ambiance, hospitality, and especially the huge swimming pool (the biggest among all I’ve seen here!) make it an unforgettable experience. 🌴🏊‍♀️

From the beautiful interiors to the mouth-watering food, everything was just perfect. Highly recommend this place for anyone looking for luxury, comfort, and nature — all in one spot. 🌿✨

⭐️ 10/10 from my side! Can’t wait to visit again! ❤️","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Hilton Garden Inn Jabalpur
address: 466, Hitkarini College Rd, Priyadarshni Colony, Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh 482005
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mohita Agrawal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVjcYXjAZpU47Z-rGnJ9cAhbmEY904g9T76Icll6CQZw1fIfG4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently stayed at the hotel and had a wonderful experience. The room was clean, spacious and very comfortable. The swimming pool was clean, well maintained, hygienic and ambience around the pool was peaceful. My toddler loved to spend time there. The breakfast and dinner buffet had a wide range of options. Every dish was fresh, flavorful, and well-presented. The staff was polite, friendly, and always ready to help. A special thanks to Mahima, Sakshi, and Tushaar from the buffet team for their exceptional service. They were extremely polite, attentive, and always ensured that everything was perfectly arranged.  Loved the live paratha stall as well. Vandana was amazing — fresh parathas, quick service, and very courteous. All this made us feel at home. This is one place I love coming back to again and again. The consistent quality, warm hospitality, and excellent service make every visit special.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nishtha Shukla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLrZlmuwxUYSJMxbq3H9FOCJ-RoLYulp0JkQ_fcepJj5SbbNA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My experience at Hilton Garden Inn, Jabalpur was extremely disappointing, mainly due to the pathetic, tasteless food and highly inattentive staff. The food quality was far below expectations — it genuinely felt like old, previously cooked food being reheated and served, with absolutely no taste or freshness. The menu itself was very limited, yet the prices were unreasonably high, which makes no sense at all.
This definitely did not feel like a 5-star or even a premium hotel experience. Paying such high prices, one expects quality, variety, and good service — none of which were present.
The service was equally frustrating. The serving staff were completely unbothered and careless. We had to repeatedly ask for basic things like plates, bowls, spoons, and even drinking water. Nothing was proactively offered, and it felt like the staff had zero interest in attending to guests.
Overall, the experience was highly disappointing and not at all value for money. Hilton’s brand promises a certain standard, but this property falls far short of it. I would not recommend dining here unless there is a serious improvement in food quality, freshness, menu options, and staff attentiveness.
I give this Five Star hotel a rating of zero stars for dining experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Monika Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZJyHOGrquvB4BZ8jqNFjl9HDAY3FHhRceB_xHLP9A6d71fA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I had the worst experience at Hilton Garden Inn. I chose this place to celebrate my birthday, expecting a memorable and special evening, but it turned out to be completely disappointing and a night mare.
The service was absolutely terrible. The staff was uncooperative, inattentive, and showed no professionalism at all. For a property that calls itself a 5-star hotel, they don’t even deserve a single star. There was no proper management or hospitality standards visible during our visit.
The food taste was third class, and the quality did not match the high prices they charge.  On top of that, they couldn’t even arrange a simple birthday cake.
It completely spoiled my special day.
Highly overpriced, poor service, bad taste, and zero coordination from staff. I would not recommend this place to anyone looking for quality dining or celebration arrangements.
Very disappointing experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jijo Sengupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3TAMu6Yw719SVmB96gWcqdattrQm2qT9LlJi1G67zpsTKL061qg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I had a very pleasant stay at Hilton Garden Inn Jabalpur.

The hotel feels modern and tech forward. The digital key synced with my phone, which made room access completely seamless. The rooms were comfortable, clean, and well designed, and overall the stay felt smooth and relaxing. The staff were polite and welcoming, which added to the positive experience.

There were, however, a couple of service gaps that stood out.

One day, coffee was unavailable across the hotel because the main machine had broken down. It seemed like there was no backup, which made it impossible to get even a basic cup of coffee anywhere on the property. For a hotel of this standard, having a contingency for essentials like coffee would really help.

On another occasion, I ordered a Perrier before heading out and it took about 15 to 20 minutes just to be informed that it was not available. When guests are on the move, quick updates matter. Speed and communication are important parts of a premium hospitality experience.

A small improvement that could elevate the stay even more would be dedicated tea and coffee service at the lobby level. There are great seating areas where guests wait or relax, and easy access to beverages there would be a big plus.

Overall, it is a very comfortable, well maintained hotel with great potential, and with a bit more focus on service speed and backup planning, it could be an outstanding experience end to end.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"91subhajitc","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeWB0GIG9gGd6g9zDFXwjE9TRuKRtAO6HvwA5jEdK_CrOJXcVxp8esjQRYTFMjay2JK=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Checking in? The "CleanStay" Seal: The rooms are perfect for everyone, even OCD patients can feel comfortable.|4.  The Bed Test: Very comfortable with standard 4 pillows. Good for your back pain too.|5.  Power & Tech: Lot of outlets are available in the room, with nice modern light switches.|6.  The Bathroom: The Bathroom has GHORE fittings, so comfortable no doubts.||Service & Amenities|7.  The "10/5" Rule: Staff members did make eye contact at 10 feet and smile/greet you at 5 feet when passing in hallways. Hence full marks.|8. From food to rooms it's all worth the money spent.

The location is just on the Sohagpur highway, easy to find and quickly accessible. There is open street parking.

They have a very nice restaurant which offers mouth watering north indian delicacies. I kust say I had the best dining experience here in the entire Ujjain-Panchmarhi trip.

Rates are reasonable according to the ambience and food quality. They maintain hygiene and sanitation well.

I also visited their rooms and they were value for money. They had room for all group sizes from a twin room to a family hall which can accommodate 10-12 people. Rooms were of decent size and interiors were okayish. Room charges are reasonable.

The location is a bit far from the Core safari zone but can be reached by a 30 minutes drive.
